data.body: SURGERY: 21dd completion verifier flagged a real gap — test_calibration_metrics omitted the stability dimension of the 'exact metric mapping' AC. Strengthened it (runs=3 + assert stability_min/mean==1.0). A wrong 'git commit --amend' had put the change on f698's commit; fixed via reset-to-21dd + amend 21dd + cherry-pick original f698 docs. Final stack: 748/749 unchanged (votes intact), 21dd(bd83709f9)+f698(a02752c03) new patchsets (Change-Ids preserved -> 750/752), re-pushed (updated: 2). Closing 3863 now (748 Verified+1); re-grinding 750/752 CI. Progress: f698+2ad8 already closed.
